title: App Billing - Bill for specific / active users only
excerpt:
Currently a major revenue blocker for us is that our users find it unfair to pay for the entire account when only 1-2 users are using our apps ( mind mapping, and birds eye view). 
There should be a way to provide access…

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently a major revenue blocker for us is that our users find it unfair to pay for the entire account when only 1-2 users are using our apps ( mind mapping, and birds eye view).

There should be a way to provide access to specific users to an app, or bill only for active users ( like slack - bill for users who have used the app in the last one month )

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the request @kranthi_thoughtflow!

Everyone, you can vote for this at the top of the screen

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: If monday.com does add this feature, my request is that the existing seat-based pricing model is not removed. I find it very helpful to be able to charge for an app based on the account’s maximum number of seats. Thanks!

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. This should be controllable by the app developer based on their buyers expectations.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Assigned user pricing would be amazing for UI apps. (not sure how it would work for integration based apps of course…)
